programme.title: Inside Africa
programme.desc: Inside Africa takes its viewers on a journey across Africa, exploring the true diversity and depth of different cultures, countries and regions

programme.title: Connecting Africa
programme.desc: From the CEO of a massive energy company in South Africa and fruit exporters in Egypt to the man who bought a bank in Nigeria, we look at all aspects of doing business in Africa

programme.title: CNN Special Report
programme.desc: Bill Weir takes viewers to high tech farms, food labs, and chef's tables across America to find out how farmers, chefs, and fishermen have adapted in the modern world. Are these changes enough to save the planet? What is the future of food?

programme.desc: We preview the Olympic golf competition with a look at the history of golf in the Olympic Games. Plus, learn about Japan's unique golfing culture

programme.title: Quest's World of Wonder
programme.desc: Perched on the rocky cliffs above a shimmering sea are medieval ramparts, nearly perfectly intact, protecting a gem inside. Explore the real heart and soul of Dubrovnik

programme.desc: Live from Atlanta, Michael Holmes brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world

programme.desc: A look at the contemporary African art market; given the wide range of applications, satellites are part of the solution when it comes to solving the connectivity gap in Africa
